column.description: Client

column.description: Company Code

column.description: Fiscal Year

column.name: BUZEI
column.description: Number of Line Item Within Accounting Document

column.name: WITHT

column.name: WT_WITHCD
column.description: Withholding tax code

column.name: WT_QSSHH
column.description: Withholding tax base amount (local currency)

column.description: Withholding tax base amount in LC for calculation

column.name: WT_QSSH3C

column.description: Withholding tax amount (in local currency)

column.description: W/tax auxiliary amount for reversal (in local currency)

column.name: WT_STAT
column.description: Line item status

column.name: WT_QSFHH
column.description: Amount exempt from withholding tax in local currency

column.description: Account Type

column.name: HKONT
column.description: General Ledger Account

column.description: General Ledger Account

column.name: QSREC
column.description: Type of recipient

column.name: AUGBL

column.name: AUGDT
column.description: Clearing Date

column.name: WT_QSZRT
column.description: Exemption rate

column.name: WT_WDMBTR

column.description: Withholding tax amount already withheld in document currency

column.name: WT_WDMBT3

column.name: TEXT15
column.description: Text (15 characters)

column.description: Enter withholding tax amount in local currency manually

column.description: Accumulated withholding tax base amount in local currency

column.description: Withholding tax rate

column.description: Indicator: Entry posted as self-withholding tax

column.description: Indicator: Entry posted as "Grossing up"

column.description: Indicator: Entry posted as a debit/credit

column.name: CTNUMBER
column.description: Withholding Tax Certificate Number

column.description: Indicator: Entry belongs to a down payment clearing item

column.description: Indicator: Entry belongs to a residual item

column.description: Issue or Print Date of Withholding Tax Certificate

column.name: WT_LOGSYS

column.description: Mandatory Contributions Base
